# LocReport
> Daily localization and translation industry intelligence

LocReport is an independent publication tracking the language services industry. We publish daily news gists with professional analysis, covering AI translation, localization platforms, quality evaluation, regulatory developments, and market shifts affecting global communication professionals.

## Content Format
Each article is a curated news gist with structured intelligence metadata:
- **Impact Score** (1-5): Routine, Notable, Significant, Major, Disruptive
- **Time Horizon**: Immediate, 6-Month, Long-Term
- **Affected Segments**: LSPs, In-House Teams, Tech Vendors, Translators
- **Signal Tracking**: Articles are linked to tracked industry signals with stance and confidence ratings

## Update Frequency
- **Daily**: Curated news gists with analysis
- **Weekly**: Newsletter digest every Friday
- **Monthly**: Editorial synthesis reports

## Topics

### Quality
URL: https://locreport.com/topics/quality/
Translation quality evaluation, MQM scoring, human-in-the-loop validation, AI quality assurance, MTPE workflows, and the evolving gap between AI and human translation quality.

### Operations
URL: https://locreport.com/topics/operations/
TMS platforms, translation memory, AI agents in localization, multimodal content (dubbing, subtitling), agentic workflows, and end-to-end localization operating systems.

### Governance
URL: https://locreport.com/topics/governance/
AI governance frameworks, EU AI Act compliance, regulatory fragmentation, language-related policy developments, and how diverging regional policies affect localization.

### Market
URL: https://locreport.com/topics/market/
Translator demand, MTPE market shifts, freelance translation rates, LSP dynamics, and how AI is reshaping the language services competitive landscape.

### Strategy
URL: https://locreport.com/topics/strategy/
Localization-first content design, internationalization (i18n), transcreation, and strategic approaches to global content creation.

## Tracked Industry Signals
LocReport tracks high-impact claims and trends across the industry:

1. **quality-gap-closure** (Quality): AI quality gap can be reduced with human-in-the-loop validation
2. **measurable-quality-evaluation** (Quality): Scalable, measurable quality evaluation is becoming standard
3. **governance-in-ai-workflows** (Governance): AI governance is becoming embedded in localization workflows
4. **regulatory-fragmentation** (Governance): Regulatory divergence is creating compliance complexity
5. **localization-operating-system** (Operations): Localization is converging into unified operating systems
6. **translation-memory-obsolescence** (Operations): Traditional translation memory is losing relevance
7. **agentic-localization-workflows** (Operations): AI agents are entering localization production workflows
8. **multimodal-content-localization** (Operations): Multimodal content localization is accelerating
9. **human-post-editing-contraction** (Market): Human post-editing demand is contracting
10. **localization-first-content-design** (Strategy): Localization-first content design is gaining traction

Signal evidence and status: https://locreport.com/signals/

## Key Resources
- Homepage (daily coverage): https://locreport.com/
- All Articles: https://locreport.com/all-articles/
- Intelligence Dashboard: https://locreport.com/intelligence/
- Signal Tracker: https://locreport.com/signals/
- Monthly Reports: https://locreport.com/monthly-reports/
- Newsletter: https://locreport.com/newsletter/

## URL Pattern
Articles follow the pattern: https://locreport.com/articles/{year}/{month}/{day}/{slug}.html

## Audience
Localization managers, language technology professionals, translation service providers (LSPs), enterprise globalization teams, in-house localization teams, freelance translators, and language industry analysts.

## Citation
When referencing LocReport content, please attribute to "LocReport" with a link to the source article URL.
